overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing through tall grass plains toward a forested area with a burning camp. The clip features cinematic lighting and wind-swept vegetation as the character approaches an enemy encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal grassland with distant tree line

agents.ego_description: samurai character jogging steadily through tall swaying grass toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: dense green grass swaying in the wind, covering the ground completely
dense forest boundary visible on the horizon ahead
blue ocean visible in the distance beyond the grassland
individual trees dotting the right side of the landscape

segments.scene_description: The samurai character runs through an expansive open grassland under a clear blue sky. Tall green grass sways dynamically in the wind as the character approaches a distant tree line, with the ocean visible far to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with enemy encampment and burning structure

events.description: character enters the forested area from the open plains, tree canopy becomes visible overhead
burning camp with wooden structures comes into view ahead, smoke rising from the fire

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while approaching the burning encampment, preparing for potential combat

notable_agents.action: enemy combatant standing near the burning fire, facing toward the approaching player

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees with green foliage forming the forest boundary
structure engulfed in flames with orange fire and rising smoke
large boulders and rocks on the right side of the path
wooden building with thatched roof visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser forested area where the sky becomes partially obscured by the canopy. Approaching a burning encampment, the scene reveals wooden structures engulfed in flames, traditional huts, and an enemy combatant standing near the fire. The lighting shifts to dappled shadows as the character moves through the trees toward the hostile presence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, wind-swept grassland into the claustrophobic intensity of a burning forest camp. It begins with the samurai running through open plains of tall green grass under a clear blue sky, with the distant ocean visible to the left. As the character approaches the tree line, the scene shifts into a denser forested area where the open sky is gradually obscured by a thick canopy of leaves. The lighting then transitions from bright daylight to dappled shadows as the camera moves deeper into the woods, eventually revealing wooden huts engulfed in flames. The sequence finally opens onto a hostile encampment, centering on an enemy combatant standing amidst the fire and smoke.
